title: aquilegia ecalcarata var. micrantha
intro: Aquilegia ecalcarata var. micrantha, also known as the small-flowered aquilegia, is a plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to be beneficial in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Aquilegia ecalcarata var. micrantha are believed to provide relief from fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as aiding in the healing of wounds and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
